description: Design a 15mm bicycle cone wrench as a single solid 3D model in FreeCAD. The wrench must feature a circular head with a 32mm diameter centered at the origin and a handle 12mm wide extending at least 100mm along the X-axis. Incorporate a 15.0mm wide jaw cutout angled at 15 degrees relative to the handle, with the throat positioned approximately 8mm from the center of the head. Extrude the final profile to a thickness of 2.0mm. Save the completed design to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/cone_wrench.FCStd.
